metadata.title: SGLang Cookbook Deployment Baselines
metadata.source_scope: Official SGLang docs_new Deployment config files; commands generated from config.cells using _deployment.jsx python-mode semantics.

models_without_cells.reason: I did not include DeepSeek-V4 commands because I could not find fixed config.cells/flag rows in the current raw config snapshot; the benchmark file has match tuples and metrics, but not the launch flags needed to reconstruct exact commands safely.

metadata.docker_command_note: Each command record also includes docker_command rendered with the same image field and a {{HF_TOKEN}} placeholder where the upstream config declares HF_TOKEN.

commands.notes: Inferred multi-node BF16 cell in the official config.
commands.python_command:
# Multi-node (2 nodes). Run this on every node.
# Fill {{NODE_RANK}} as 0 on the head node, then 1..N-1 on others.
# Fill {{NODE0_IP}} with the head-node IP reachable from all nodes.
sglang serve \
  --model-path zai-org/GLM-5.2 \
  --tp 16 \
  --nnodes 2 \
  --node-rank {{NODE_RANK}} \
  --dist-init-addr {{NODE0_IP}}:20000 \
  --speculative-algorithm EAGLE \
  --speculative-num-steps 1 \
  --speculative-eagle-topk 1 \
  --speculative-num-draft-tokens 2 \
  --mem-fraction-static 0.85 \
  --chunked-prefill-size 32768 \
  --max-running-requests 80 \
  --host 0.0.0.0 \
  --port 30000
commands.docker_command:
docker run --gpus all \
  --shm-size 32g \
  --network host \
  -v ~/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface \
